title: Executive, Sales Support
description:
COMPANY DESCRIPTION

Constellar is Asia's preferred partner for convening businesses, curating ideas and creating opportunities for sustainable business growth and global impact. Based in Singapore, we curate and develop influential trade events for key industries and sectors, connecting people, global marketplaces and networks for sustainable growth. We also manage the Singapore EXPO, Singapore's largest purpose-built venue for Meetings, Incentives, Conventions and Exhibitions (MICE).

Our vision is to be a global leader made in Asia, activating impactful networks to enable cross-industry collaboration and innovation through our holistic portfolio of intellectual property (IP) in the MICE industry.

RESPONSIBILITIES

Support the Directors and Managers in the effective execution of Culinary and Advertising & Promotions (A&P) sales operations. This role involves strong internal coordination and external stakeholder management to achieve revenue targets while delivering an excellent experience for venue clients and patrons.

  • Collaborate with the A&P Manager to conceptualize and implement venue advertising and promotional strategies that build a robust sales pipeline and identify new sales opportunities.
  • Act as a key liaison between internal operations and event services teams and external partners, including advertising agencies, media houses, printing vendors, authorities, and other relevant stakeholders, to ensure seamless service delivery.
  • Support the Culinary Manager in conducting regular inspections, evaluations, and engagement sessions with catering consultants and partners to maintain high standards of food quality and service.
  • Assist in managing the externally appointed operator for the Exhibitor Service Centre (ESC) platform, ensuring operational excellence and adherence to service level agreements (SLAs), including: 1) Timely response to enquiries, 2) Order processing and fulfilment, 3) Content management, 4) Pricing strategy execution and 5) Onsite collection kiosk operations.
  • Support the accurate and timely issuance of invoices, payment tracking and payment collection according to the contractual terms.
  • Provide general administrative and operational support as required to ensure smooth day-to-day operations.
QUALIFICATIONS
  • Diploma or equivalent in Business Administration, Hospitality, or a related field.
  • Proven experience in an administrative or sales support role.
  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
  • Strong organizational and time-management abilities.
  • Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, Outlook).
  • Ability to work independently and as part of a team.
  • Detail-oriented and able to manage multiple tasks simultaneously.
  • Experience with contract administration is a plus.
Please note that your application will be sent to and reviewed by the direct employer - Constellar Venues Pte Ltd

postedCompany.name: HYPERSCAL SOLUTIONS PTE. LTD.

hiringCompany.description:
Founded in 2021, Constellar Holdings manages a holistic portfolio of digital-enabled IPs that connects a global eco-system of partners for the Meetings, Incentives, Conventions and Exhibitions (MICE) industry.

With an extensive global footprint and over five decades of experience curating innovative event and venue experiences for businesses and consumers, Constellar offers customisable digital and hybrid event and event space solutions that help expand global business networks and enable cross-industry collaboration.

Constellar aims to be a MICE industry champion of growth activating impactful networks for sustainable growth, setting the highest standards of engagements worldwide.
hiringCompany.name: CONSTELLAR VENUES PTE. LTD.
